prompt: Create a professional lifestyle fashion portrait of a stylish young woman leaning confidently against a dark polished marble building pillar in a luxurious modern urban city environment. She wears an elegant cream monochromatic outfit: an oversized tailored blazer draped open over her shoulders, a fitted cream cropped tank top, high-waisted wide-leg pleated trousers, and clean white low-top sneakers. Add delicate minimal jewelry including a small pendant necklace and bracelet, and have her hold one metallic stainless-steel water bottle at her side. Pose her relaxed with one shoulder against the glossy black marble wall, one arm bent with her hand resting near her waist, legs crossed casually at the ankles, looking toward the camera with calm confidence. Use a vertical full-body editorial fashion composition, natural daylight, warm reflections, shallow depth of field, softly blurred glass buildings and city walkway in the background, realistic skin and fabric texture, premium magazine street-style photography, 85mm lens look, high detail, no text, no watermark.
